g.text: "Turned Back at the Clockwork Galleries Barrier"
"Turned Back at the Whispering Library Barrier"
"Turned Back at the Wind-Scoured Ramparts Barrier"
Climb the ivy on the north face.
Drop down to the tower gate.
Take the cache and press on.
Rest a moment in the alcove.
Take the cache and press on.
Rest a moment in the alcove.
Take the cache and press on.
Rest a moment in the alcove.
Take the cache and press on.
Rest a moment in the alcove.
Brace the doors against the night.
Refuse the shadow and set the shards.
Try to set the shards blind.
Turn the crown sunwise, as the log said.
Turn the crown widdershins, to spite the...
Read on, then approach the crown.
Take the key to the crown.
Snatch the shard back and run for the cr...
Let the shadow take the shard.
Set the shards from the far side.
